## Security

- [ ] CHK001 Ensure all credentials are stored securely (not in plain text)
- [ ] CHK002 Verify keychain integration works correctly on all platforms
- [ ] CHK003 Confirm OTP/TOTP secrets are handled securely

## Testing

- [ ] CHK004 All new functionality has unit tests
- [ ] CHK005 Integration tests cover credential management flows
- [ ] CHK006 CLI interface has appropriate test coverage
- [ ] CHK007 Unit test coverage reaches 80%+ threshold
- [ ] CHK008 All functions and methods have corresponding unit tests
- [ ] CHK009 Test suite passes in CI environment

## Documentation

- [ ] CHK010 All code comments are written in Chinese
- [ ] CHK011 All API documentation is provided in Chinese
- [ ] CHK012 All user guides are written in Chinese
- [ ] CHK013 All README files use Chinese as primary language

## Code Quality

- [ ] CHK007 Code follows Go standards and best practices
- [ ] CHK008 Error handling is comprehensive
- [ ] CHK009 Security vulnerabilities are addressed

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
